tuning: E A D G B E

pro_brother.version_description: AGPv8 Chords and lyrics on melody track.

content:
Transpose -3 steps with buttons on the left for original key, (or leave like this to 
sing with baritones!). Ask if you want chord fingering help.


[tab][Intro]
    [ch]E[/ch]          [ch]C#m[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]          [ch]C#m[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]
e|--4--------4--4--------4--2-------------------4--------4--4--------4--2------------------|
B|--6--6--7-----6--6--7-----4--6--7--6--4--2----6--6--7-----6--6--7-----4--6--7--6--4--2---|
G|--6-----------6-----------4--------------3----6-----------6-----------4--------------3---|
D|-----------------------------------------4-------------------------------------------4---|
A|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
E|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
               I love you                   Yeah[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab] [ch]E[/ch]               [ch]C#m[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
Babe, I love you so,  I want you to know,[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]E[/ch]                   [ch]C#m[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]                        [ch]A[/ch]
That I'm gonna miss your love, the minute you walk out that door[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]                [ch]E[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
So please don't go, don't go, don't go away[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
Please don't go, don't go, I'm begging you to stay[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]                   [ch]C#m[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]
If you leave, at least in my lifetime, I've had one dream come true[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]E[/ch]             [ch]C#m[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]A[/ch]
I was blessed, to be loved, by someone as wonderful as you[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]                [ch]E[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
So please don't go, don't go, don't go away[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
Please don't go, don't go, I'm begging you to stay, hey, hey, hey [/tab]


[tab][Bridge]
    [ch]E[/ch]          [ch]C#m[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]          [ch]C#m[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]
e|--4--------4--4--------4--2-------------------4--------4--4--------4--2------------------|
B|--6--6--7-----6--6--7-----4--6--7--6--4--2----6--6--7-----6--6--7-----4--6--7--6--4--2---|
G|--6-----------6-----------4--------------3----6-----------6-----------4--------------3---|
D|-----------------------------------------4-------------------------------------------4---|
A|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
E|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
                                            Yeah[/tab]


[Verse 3]
[tab] [ch]E[/ch]               [ch]C#m[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]A[/ch]
Babe, I love you so, I, I want you to know[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]E[/ch]                   [ch]C#m[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]                        [ch]A[/ch]
That I'm gonna miss your love, the minute you walk out that door[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab]                 [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
So please don't go, don't go, don't go away, hey, hey,[/tab]
[tab] [ch]E[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]A[/ch]
Hey, I need your love, I'm down on my knees, beggin' please, please, please[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]E[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]
Don't go, don't you hear me, baby?  don't leave me now, oh, no, no, no[/tab]
[tab] [ch]E[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]A[/ch]                          [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
No, please don't go, I want you to know, that I, I, I love you so[/tab]

[ch]E[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]

[tab][ch]E[/ch]                           [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
Please don't leave me, baby, please don't go[/tab]
